native_safety_patches.purpose: Bind confirmation replay to the requested confirmation ID and re-check policy and allowlist constraints before replay.
Emit dashboard stream result success from native boolean response data.

sdk_integration_patches.purpose: Include the native CDP target id in tab-list records so Python CDP target selection can resolve SDK tab labels without URL ambiguity.

build_surface_drift_assertions.purpose: Assert that upstream still exposes the dashboard stream hooks used by SDK session observability.
